category_pain_language.quote: The hard part is not adding another field; it is getting people to update the next step before the deal goes stale.
Managers ask for forecast accuracy, but reps are still reconstructing what happened from memory at the end of the week.

status_quo_frustrations.quote: We keep a side tracker because the official process has too many required clicks for a quick call note.

workarounds.workaround: Team members keep a private call-note list and copy only selected details into the official system later.
workarounds.pain_it_reveals: The official workflow is perceived as too slow for in-the-moment activity capture.
workarounds.quote: I write the call notes somewhere fast, then clean them up when I have time.

desired_outcomes.claim: Sales managers want next actions, deal stage changes, and recent activity visible before forecast reviews.
Teams value a workflow where reps can update deal context without interrupting selling time.

objection_language.quote: Every rollout promises visibility, then turns into another admin habit people have to remember.

source_gaps.reason: Review-site pages found during fixture collection were product-specific, so they were excluded from category-only evidence.
